display.purpose: Brand wordmarks and landing hero anchors.

headline.purpose: Section headings and scanner page titles.

shadows.name: nav-glow
shadows.purpose: Bottom border glow anchoring fixed navigation bar.

shadows.name: hero-glow
shadows.purpose: Text drop shadow for main hero titles.

shadows.name: dropdown-shadow
shadows.purpose: Elevation shadow separating modals from dark backgrounds.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default 300ms easing for interactive button and card hovers.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Tactical emerald gradient pill button for primary calls to action.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: linear-gradient(to right, #1E7D04, #0A3301); color: #ffffff; padding: 14px 40px; border-radius: 9999px; font-weight: 600; font-size: 1.125rem; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { opacity: 0.7; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #000000, 0 0 0 4px #22c55e; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Emerald outline pill button for secondary actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; border: 1px solid #1E7D04; color: #1E7D04; padding: 12px 40px; border-radius: 9999px; font-weight: 600; font-size: 1.125rem; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), color 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background-color: #025714; color: #ffffff; }

components.name: Scanner Dropzone Card
components.description: Translucent dark glass dropzone card with emerald border luminosity.
components.html:
Drag and drop your suspicious file

Supports EXE, PDF, DOCX up to 100MB
components.css: .ds-scanner-card { background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4); border: 1px solid rgba(30, 125, 4, 0.5); border-radius: 16px; padding: 40px 24px; text-align: center; display: flex; flex-direction: column; items-center: center; justify-content: center; gap: 12px; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), border-color 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-scanner-card:hover { background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.55); border-color: rgba(34, 197, 94, 0.8); } .ds-drop-title { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.87); font-weight: 600; font-size: 1.125rem; margin: 0; } .ds-drop-sub { color: #9ca3af; font-size: 0.875rem; margin: 0; }

narrative.overview: Vanguard is designed as an engineered, high-precision defense console where every indicator serves immediate situational awareness and rapid threat response. Built on pure cyber black (#000000) with vibrant emerald and tactical green gradients (#1E7D04 to #0A3301), the interface conveys calm superiority and technical authority without sensory fatigue.
keyCharacteristics: Committed Dark Identity: Pure black canvas paired with translucent surface layering to create depth without muddiness.
Tactical Emerald Focus: Controlled, purposeful use of green gradients and border glows to draw immediate focus to interactive dropzones.
Engineered Legibility: High contrast (≥4.5:1 body text) and non-color-only status indicators ensuring uncompromising WCAG AA compliance.
Responsive & Motion-Aware: Smooth micro-interactions and ambient particle glows that instantly adapt and respect prefers-reduced-motion.

rules.name: The Tactical Restraint Rule
rules.body: Primary emerald gradients (#1E7D04 to #0A3301) are reserved strictly for primary actions, scanner dropzones, and brand wordmarks. Never use green backgrounds as generic container fills or decorative padding.

rules.name: The Purposeful Display Rule
rules.body: The Gargoyles display typeface is restricted to brand wordmarks (.nav-logo-text) and major section anchors (.landing-section-title). All interactive forms, diagnostic tables, and telemetry charts must use the system sans-serif.

rules.name: The Flat Canvas Rule
rules.body: Cards and containers never use heavy white or gray box-shadows. Elevation is expressed exclusively through border luminosity (border-[#1E7D04]/50) and subtle green glow diffusion on hover.

dos: Do maintain ≥4.5:1 contrast for all primary and secondary text against #000000 or #0c0c0c backgrounds.
Do pair icon + text badges alongside color when communicating scan results.
Do use rounded-full (9999px) for CTA buttons and rounded-2xl (16px) for cards and scanner dropzones.
Do wrap animated background effects in prefers-reduced-motion fallbacks.
Do enforce Gargoyles strictly on brand headings and section anchors while preserving system sans-serif for high-density telemetry.
donts: Don't use generic corporate blue or purple gradients; Vanguard is strictly anchored in cyber black and tactical emerald.
Don't use border-radius: 32px+ on rectangular cards or containers; over-rounding destroys technical authority.
Don't pair border: 1px solid with wide, soft drop shadows; pick crisp border glows or flat layering.
Don't add repetitive all-caps small tracked eyebrows above every section heading.
Don't display raw, unstructured terminal log dumps on user-facing scan output pages without clear visual summaries.
